id.description: Unique identifier for the BET content (UUID v4).

links.description: Links for downloading and viewing the content.

download.description: Plan B Network public link to a folder for downloading the contents.

view.description: List of language-specific viewable document links.

items.description: Language-specific view link where the key is the language code.

additionalProperties.description: Plan B Network public link to a readable document.

contributor_names.description: List of contributors who helped format, review, or translate the content, identified by their GitHub usernames.

project_id.description: UUID of the associated project that organizes this content.

original_language.description: The original language of the content (ISO 639-1 code).

proofreading.description: Proofreading metadata for each language version.

language.description: Language code for the version being proofread.

last_contribution_date.description: The date when last contribution was received (YYYY-MM-DD format).

urgency.description: Level of urgency from 1 (low) to higher values (high urgency).

contributor_names.description: List of contributor GitHub usernames for this proofreading.

reward.description: Amount of sats available for reward.

tags.description: List of associated tags to this content from the PlanB Network tag list.

assets_rules.description: Required image assets for BET content.
